The Guardian.name: The Guardian
The Guardian.ability: You may use a Guide action on a Hero, with their permission. This does not take an action.

The Investigator.name: The Investigator
The Investigator.ability: Discard two items to pick one item from the discard pile and keep it.

The Buccaneer.name: The Buccaneer
The Buccaneer.ability: At the start of your turn, discard one item to gain +4 actions this turn (use only once per turn).

The Fortune Teller.name: The Fortune Teller
The Fortune Teller.ability: You may look at the top Monster card on your turn. This does not take an action.

The Parapsychologist.name: The Parapsychologist
The Parapsychologist.ability: You may distribute any items you have to other players.

Actor.name: Actor
Actor.ability: Discard two Items to pick one Item from the discard pile and keep it.

Hoplite.name: Hoplite
Hoplite.ability: Place your Hero in a space with a Lair.

Mariner.name: Mariner
Mariner.ability: Give any number of Items you have to another player.

Musician.name: Musician
Musician.ability: Place your Hero in a space with a Legend.

Ranger.name: Ranger
Ranger.ability: When the Terror Level increases, draw a Perk card. Ability is always in effect and does not take an action.

Shepherd.name: Shepherd
Shepherd.ability: Look at the top Monster card.
